title: Dependent Drag and Drop
excerpt:
In the “Task view” you should be able to drag a task into the “Dependent” box of another task, to automatically make the connection. 
In the Gantt view, you should be able to right click and create a link from item to it…

posts.author: Gbolyard (Garrick Bolyard)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the “Task view” you should be able to drag a task into the “Dependent” box of another task, to automatically make the connection.
In the Gantt view, you should be able to right click and create a link from item to item.

posts.author: Gbolyard (Garrick Bolyard)
posts.cookedHtml: Bumping to get this dealt with. A very easy feature to implement and will streamline the gantt chart development for projects.
